info.title: Wellness Academy API
info.description: API for the Mental Health Education Platform — Wellness Academy. Session-based auth via Lucia, AI coaching via OpenRouter, content moderation on community features.

post.summary: Sign in with email and password

200.description: Sign in successful, sets session cookie

400.description: Validation error or email already in use

post.summary: Save life situation and social support info
Save coping history, triggers, therapy background
Run AI analysis on onboarding data
Mark a lesson as completed and award XP

get.summary: Get quiz questions for a lesson
Get tracking log for a lesson
Get thought record for a lesson
Get checklist state for a lesson
Get interactive component state for a lesson

post.summary: Send a message to the wellness coach
post.description: Authenticated chat with the AI wellness coach. Includes crisis detection and personalized context from the user profile.
Text-to-speech via OpenAI. Returns audio/mpeg stream.
Speech-to-text via OpenAI Whisper. Accepts audio file upload.
Requires authentication. Content is AI-moderated before publishing.
Requires authentication. Content is AI-moderated before publishing.

get.summary: Health check for load balancers and monitoring
get.description: Returns app and database status. Use ?diag=ai for AI service readiness, ?diag=ai-test for live connectivity test.
